prompt:
Add GDK_DPI_SCALE environment variable to the classic-laddie host config, NOT to the generic workstation module.

In hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix, add an environment.sessionVariables block with GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15". Place it near the top of the config, after the networking section (around line 28). For example:

  # Dell U4025QW DPI compensation for GTK apps (~140 real DPI vs 96 assumed)
  environment.sessionVariables.GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15";

This is host-specific because the Dell U4025QW monitor is only on this machine. Don't touch modules/common/workstation.nix.
